summary: Full backend + frontend validation of the new global, seatless Attendance feature. 17/17 new pytest cases for /api/attendance pass (settings GET/PATCH with HH:MM validation, bootstrap, auto-late on absent→present in work hours, early_leave/present time stamping, excused/note preservation, mark-all-present, 401/403 RBAC, empty-students no-crash, student_order persistence). Frontend e2e verified on /attendance: login as nivin, page renders all 11 expected testids, 6 student cards bootstrap as present, dialog opens on tap, status changes propagate (data-status + summary counts), mark-all-present resets every card to green, view toggle flips Arabic label, day_start input persists via onBlur PATCH. RTL Arabic UI intact, status colors correct. Existing regression suite test_full_stack.py: 20/21 pass — the one failing test (preview admin retains admin powers) is OUTDATED, asserting the loose RBAC behaviour that iteration_1 flagged for tightening; the backend now correctly returns 403, so update the assertion in test_full_stack.py:293 to expect 403.

issues: Console a11y warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for {DialogContent}'. Add a <DialogDescription> (or aria-describedby) to silence the radix-ui warning.

action_items: Update /app/backend/tests/test_full_stack.py line 293 — change `assert ... == 200` to `assert ... == 403` (admin-previewing-teacher should no longer reach admin-only /api/teachers, which is the correct fix from iteration_1's open question).
Add a <DialogDescription> (or aria-describedby) to the StatusEditor DialogContent in AttendancePage.jsx to remove the radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: attendance.py is clean: _public_record strips _id, all queries use teacher_id scope from token, HH:MM validated with regex, idempotent bootstrap, mark-all-present uses upsert with $setOnInsert correctly.

Auto-late rule (absent→present within work hours) only fires from prev_status=='absent'; this is the documented and tested behaviour. If teacher first sets to late explicitly then to present, stamps are correctly wiped — verified.
AttendancePage.jsx: onBlur saves day_start/day_end which is good UX, but if the user types an invalid HH:MM the PATCH 422s silently (toast.error). Consider showing inline validation feedback.
AttendancePage.jsx has its own drag-and-drop implementation rather than a library — acceptable for ~30-40 cards but won't scroll on touch devices. Not blocking for MVP.
Status colors match spec (present #16a34a, absent #dc2626, late #ea580c, early_leave #2563eb).

success_rate.backend: 100% (17/17 new attendance tests, 20/21 regression; the 1 regression failure is an outdated assertion, not a bug)

test_credentials: Admin bsn.1988 / 12abAB!?  ;  Teacher nivin / 123456 (already seeded). All TEST_ students cleaned up.
seed_data_creation: Created 6 TEST_طالب_{1..6} students under nivin during UI testing, deleted after run. Attendance settings reset to defaults (07:00/13:00, student_order:[]). Pytest fixtures create+delete their own teachers (TEST_att_*, TEST_emp_*) and cascade-clean students/attendance via DELETE /api/teachers/{id}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression: /app/backend/tests/test_full_stack.py + /app/backend/tests/test_attendance.py. Login: nivin/123456 for teacher flows. The full_stack test asserting admin-preview can hit /api/teachers (line 293) is intentionally outdated — main agent likely tightened require_admin to also check role==admin (the correct fix). Update that assertion to == 403 when you next touch it.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. The single failing regression assertion is a test-staleness issue, not a product bug; the underlying RBAC change is the intended fix from iteration_1's open action item.
